subcodes.first_line: All the Prophets and chosen ones have been commissioned by God, glorified be His majesty, to nurture the trees of human existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع انبیا و اولیا از نزد حق جل جلاله مامور بوده اند که اشجار وجود انسانی را
